top3.sql:
SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
  AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(`Enrollment (K-12)` - `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE schools.FundingType = 'Local'
  );

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
  AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(`Enrollment (K-12)` - `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE schools.FundingType = 'Local'
  );

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
  AND (f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`)
    FROM frpm f2
    JOIN schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
    WHERE s2.FundingType = 'Local'
  );

WITH locally_funded_diff AS (
  SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOCType,
    ABS(CAST(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` AS REAL) - CAST(f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS REAL)) AS diff
  FROM schools s
  JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
  WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
),
avg_diff AS (
  SELECT AVG(diff) AS avg_diff_val
  FROM locally_funded_diff
)
SELECT School, DOCType
FROM locally_funded_diff, avg_diff
WHERE locally_funded_diff.diff > avg_diff.avg_diff_val;

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
  AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(`Enrollment (K-12)` - `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE schools.FundingType = 'Local'
  );

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
  AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM frpm f2
    JOIN schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
    WHERE s2.FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
  );

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
  AND (f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`)
    FROM frpm f2
    JOIN schools s2 ON f2.CDSCode = s2.CDSCode
    WHERE s2.FundingType = 'Local'
  );

final.sql:
SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
  AND ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
    SELECT AVG(ABS(`Enrollment (K-12)` - `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE schools.FundingType = 'Local'
  );
